REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEFT'S REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOS TO MOTION TO STRIKE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AND MARTIN LUTHER KING-MARCUS GARVEY SQUARE COOPERATIVE APARTMENTS, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16 (ANTI-SLAPP STATUTE). RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. THE MOTION IS NOT MOOT BY THE FILING OF AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. SIMMONS V. ALLSTATE INS. CO. (2001) 92 CAL.APP.4TH 1068, 1073-1074. DEFENDANTS HAVE DEMONSTRATED THAT THE CONDUCT ALLEGED IS PROTECTED BY CCP SECTION 425.16 FOR IT IS BASED ON THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION. FELDMAN V. PARK LANE ASSOCIATES (2008) 160 CAL.APP.4TH 1467. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT PLAINTIFF HAS A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING. EACH OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION IS PREMISED ON DEFENDANT'S UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION AND THAT IS PRIVILEGED CONDUCT. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-17-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 425.16

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-27-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE GRANTED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART, AND, MARTIN LUTHER KING-MARCUS GARVEY SQUARE'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO ATTORNEY FEES PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 425.16(C). HOURLY RATE REASONABLE, AND TIME EXPENDED REASONABLE AND NECESSARY. DEFENDANT AWARDED ATTORNEY FEES IN THE LODESTAR AMOUNT OF $3,870. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Mar-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART, and, MARTIN LUTHER KING-MARCUS GARVEY SQUARE'S Motion for Attorney Fees. Appearances: Hanesther Kim, Esq., of Dimitriou & Associates, P.C. (415) 434-1144, appearing for Plaintiffs and opposing party; Mercedes Gavin, Law Offices of Mercedes Gavin, (415) 497-1493, appearing for Defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for attorney's fees granted. Defendant is entitled to attorney fees pursuant to CCP section 425.16(c). Hourly rate reasonable, and time expended reasonable and necessary. Defendant awarded attorney fees in the Lodestar amount of $3,870. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

DEFENDANTS HAVE DEMONSTRATED THAT THE CONDUCT ALLEGED IS PROTECTED BY CCP SECTION 425.16 FOR IT IS BASED ON THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION. FELDMAN V. PARK LANE ASSOCIATES (2008) 160 CAL.APP.4TH 1467. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT PLAINTIFF HAS A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING. EACH OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION IS PREMISED ON DEFENDANT'S UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION AND THAT IS PRIVILEGED CONDUCT. Defendant to submit proposed form of order. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J.
